name: Derek Parks
awards: Project Organization Excellence Award, Team Leadership Recognition
bio: Derek leads field operations with a craftsmanship mindset built on decades of hands-on experience across complex builds. He combines practical leadership, safety discipline, and quality control to keep crews aligned and projects progressing from groundbreaking through turnover.
careerHighlights: Leads field production with craftsmanship-first quality expectations.
Guides crews through complex phases while protecting safety and schedule.
Maintains execution discipline from site startup through final punch.
Supports strong client confidence with practical, transparent communication.
funFact: Derek finds the most satisfaction in watching skilled crews turn plans into lasting work.
certifications: Forklift Operator, Scissor Lift Operator, Snake Lift Operator, CPR Certified, Procore Certified
